channel.title: Materials Testing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Materials Testing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: The effect of MWCNT concentration on the electrical resistance change characteristic of glass/fiber epoxy composites under low cycle fatigue loading
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0107

item.title: Effect of TMAB and ZrC concentration on mechanical and morphological properties of Ni–B/ZrC composite electrodeposition
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0262

item.title: Influence of pulse duration and frequency of laser surface texturing on the surface roughness and microstructure of CoCr28Mo alloy for biomedical applications
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0139

item.title: Comparison of Ni-based SiC and B4C reinforcements on a TIG-coated AISI 1040 steel
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0459

item.title: Fatigue life of friction stir spot welds between Z91 magnesium alloy and ENAW7075-T651 aluminum alloy
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0175

item.title: Effect of wire feed speed and arc length on weld bead geometry in synergistic controlled pulsed MIG/MAG welding
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0194

item.title: Structural and morphological behavior of Al-based hybrid composites reinforced by SiC and WS2 inorganic material
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0248

item.title: Impact behavior of natural material-based sandwich composites
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0336

item.title: Effects of different production methods and hybridization on mechanical characteristics of basalt, flax, and jute fiber-reinforced composites
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0232

item.title: Effect of heat treatment on interface characteristics and mechanical properties of explosive welded Cu/Ti composites
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0070

item.title: Enhanced mechanical properties of Sr-modified Al–Mg–Si alloy by thermo-mechanical treatment
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0264

item.title: Mechanical properties of laser welded similar and dissimilar steel joints of TBF1050 and DP1000 steel sheets
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0135

item.title: Mechanical behavior of composite pipe structures under compressive force and its prediction using different machine learning algorithms
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0192

item.title: Advanced structural design of engineering components utilizing an artificial neural network and GNDO algorithm
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0216

item.title: Energy efficiency in materials testing by reactive power – part 1: power recirculating method in wear testing
item.description: Article by Dietmar Findeisen, Dirk Schröpfer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2023-0136
